head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: P1: MV3-Small conservative zoom probe. Tiny objects (area<0.01) are the #1 failure mode — pygmy_seahorse_0 mIoU ~0.4. Natural zoom gives higher-resolution views of small objects at zero inference cost. CONSERVATIVE probs (50/30/10/0). Single variable vs E-45 (MV3-Small, 8ep, no zoom). Success: IoU_tiny ≥ 0.55, pygmy_seahorse_0 +0.05, pf_mIoU drop ≤ 0.01. No-go: pf_mIoU drop >0.02, any size bin drop >0.05, pygmy_seahorse_0 degrades, unstable training.
